purpose: Define cognitive Story-to-TDD compilation as a Gemini Flash worker-mediated lane, not a deterministic artifact projection.
law: Deterministic replay can verify previously declared artifacts. Cognitive compile must invoke Gemini Flash.
requires: governed acceptance gates before authority promotion
forbids: criteria extraction without Gemini invocation receipt
test intent generation without Gemini invocation receipt
implementation proposal without Gemini invocation receipt
mock AI responses in cognitive compile
completionPosture: A lane may not create new story, criteria, test intent, ambiguity analysis, or implementation proposal authority unless Gemini Flash ran and left dispatch, response, and invocation receipt evidence.
